Runtime gate: character coverage is role/archetype/ecology-oriented and must not be interpreted as a complete fixed canon character database.

registryUseGate.characterIndexPolicy: characters-index is primarily occupational, institutional, and ecological role slots because sources emphasize systems over named NPCs
registryUseGate.runtimePolicy: do not treat hunter/guild/ecology role entries or monster categories as a complete fixed canon NPC list

conflictReviewStatus.reviewScope: registry metadata only; no new canon/source facts asserted
conflictReviewStatus.rationale: Empty conflictLog means no conflicts are currently registered in the curated file; it has not been independently reviewed as conflict-free.
